Core API Reference

This document provides detailed API reference for the core components of Agent Patterns.

BaseAgent

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - build_graph
    - run
    - process_response
    - save_to_memory
    - retrieve_from_memory
    - _call_llm
    - _get_prompt
